Z-scores from logistic regression per gene (binary outcome)

Source: R/derive_reference.R
z_scores_binary.Rd

Z-scores from logistic regression per gene (binary outcome)

Usage

z_scores_binary(
  expr,
  group,
  verbose = TRUE,
  binary_positive_reference = c("second", "first")
)

Developed by Brooks Benard.
